overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character running through a desert canyon landscape with iconic red rock formations. The character passes a horse-drawn carriage at the start and continues along a dirt trail toward distant buttes and spires under a bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon trail with horse carriage

events.description: character runs past the stationary horse-drawn carriage on the left side of the trail
character enters and crosses a shallow water puddle in the trail

agents.ego_description: cowboy character running steadily along the dirt trail, passing the carriage and approaching the canyon

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage stationary on the left with passengers seated atop

entered.detail: wooden horse-drawn wagon with passengers on the left side of the trail
tall thin red rock spire formation visible in the distance ahead
large red rock mesa and canyon wall on the left side
massive red rock formation with sun glare behind it on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the cowboy character running along a desert trail, immediately passing a stationary horse-drawn carriage on the left. The environment features wide-open desert canyon terrain with sparse scrub vegetation. Around 8 seconds, the character crosses a shallow water puddle before continuing onto dry ground, with a distinctive tall spire butte visible in the distant center.

events.description: sun becomes more prominent in the frame with increased lens flare as character turns slightly
character adjusts trajectory slightly to approach the tall spire formation directly ahead

agents.ego_description: running steadily toward the tall spire rock formation, maintaining a central path through the valley

entered.detail: large dome-shaped red rock butte appearing next to the tall spire
bright sun glare becoming visible as the character turns toward the light

segments.scene_description: The character runs through the open desert valley after crossing the water, with the left canyon wall now prominent on the near left. The lighting shifts as the sun becomes more visible, creating lens flare. A large rounded butte appears beside the tall spire formation as the character approaches these landmark rock structures.

events.description: character turns right to navigate around the tall spire formation
spire formation moves to the left as new distant twin buttes appear ahead on the horizon

agents.ego_description: running past the tall spire and rounding the rock formation while heading toward new distant landmarks

entered.detail: pair of rock formations visible on the distant horizon ahead
sloping red rock hillside on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to pass the tall spire formation, which gradually moves to the left side of the frame and recedes into the distance. New rock formations appear on the horizon ahead as the character navigates around the spire. The right side of the trail features a sloping rock face, while dust kicks up from the character's footsteps.

events.description: character makes slight course adjustment toward the twin buttes directly ahead

agents.ego_description: running steadily toward the distant twin rock formations on the horizon through the open desert

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character running through open desert terrain toward the distant twin buttes, which gradually grow larger in the frame. The tall spire formation from earlier segments fades into the distance behind. The trail continues through sparse desert scrub vegetation with dust trailing behind the running character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide desert canyon that transitions from a trail-side passage into an open valley dominated by towering rock formations. It begins with a cowboy running along a dirt trail, passing a stationary horse-drawn carriage amidst sparse scrub vegetation. As the character continues forward, the path leads across a shallow water puddle before returning to dry ground, with a distinctive tall spire butte emerging in the distance. The scene then expands into an open valley where a prominent canyon wall rises on the left and the sunlight intensifies, creating a bright lens flare. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they approach the landmark rock structures, where a large rounded butte now stands beside the distant spire.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a red rock canyon that transitions from a narrow passage beside a towering spire into a wide-open desert expanse. It begins as the character turns right to pass a tall spire formation, which gradually recedes to the left of the frame while new rock formations emerge on the horizon. As the character navigates around the spire, the camera tracks along a sloping rock face on the right side of the trail with dust kicking up from every footstep. The scene then opens into a vast desert terrain, where the initial spire fades into the distance and the view expands toward distant twin buttes. Finally, the camera pushes forward through sparse scrub vegetation as the buttes grow larger in the frame and a trail of dust lingers behind the running character.
